title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Deloitte India Digital Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Deloitte India Digital Technologies in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Deloitte India Digital Technologies:
Deloitte India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deloitte India Digital Technologies!
